title: rosa × convinciens
intro: Rosa × convinciens, also known as Rosa rugosa, is a species of rose that is native to East Asia and has been naturalized in other parts of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × convinciens include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Rosa × convinciens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a capsule or supplement.
